raw_consumer_statement: After making a purchase in early XXXX and paying for it for signing up for their Best Buy Credit Card, I began receiving overdue notices about XXXX  months later and have been receiving those plus interest monthly. I contacted Best Buy on XX/XX/XXXX and told it was a scam. I reported it to FTC that day. I get a new bill plus interest regularly. I contacted Best Buy today, XXXX XXXX, XXXX and they said, again, it is a scam. The Billing is on official Best Buy notices with the disclaimer that CITI handles their accounts. The past due amount may be from CITI whose information does appear on the invoice.
